messages.noAccessDescription: The current account or device does not have warehouse access.
messages.keywordRequired: Enter a barcode, item number, product code, or location keyword.
messages.invalidQuantity: Enter an initial quantity of 0 or more
messages.quantityBackendRequired: The backend does not support saving the initial quantity yet. Update the API before binding.

product.emptyDescription: Search or scan to view the warehouse product details.
product.noResultsDescription: Try another barcode, item number, or product code.
product.locationBoundHint: Use Bind location to change the current location. Clearing requires confirmation.
product.unbindLocationDescription: Clear location {{location}} from the current product?
product.locationLookupHint: Search a bin to quickly bind the current product.
product.retailSyncConfirmDescription: Retail price will update the product master and warehouse OEM price. Also update the price table for all active branches?

location.emptyDescription: Search locations, create locations, and bind or unbind warehouse products.
location.noResultsDescription: Try another location code or barcode.
location.lookupProductPlaceholder: Enter item number / barcode to bind to this location
location.productListEmpty: No product is currently bound to this bin.
location.pickLocationSingleProductHint: Pick locations can only bind one product. Unbind the current product before binding another.
location.pickLocationOccupiedHint: This pick location already has a product and cannot bind another one.
location.bindModalSearchPlaceholder: Search by name, item, or barcode
location.bindModalSearchHint: Search or scan, then choose the product to bind.
location.bindModalQuantityHint: The selected quantity will be submitted with the product-location binding.
location.storageBindConfirmDescription: Storage location {{location}} already has {{count}} products. Continue binding?
location.barcodeAutoHint: Location barcode will be generated automatically as EAN13.
location.duplicateCode: Location code {{code}} already exists. Choose another slot before saving.
location.slotGroupFull: This location group is full. Change the letter, zone, or shelf.

camera.permissionDescription: Enable camera access before scanning or taking product photos.
